Video.summary: A group of wagons begins to run out of food and water after becoming trapped in a hot desert.
Video.title: How Death Valley Got Its Name

Image.alt: How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name
How Death Valley Got Its Name

Video.summary: Two rival restaurant owners see their competition take a romantic turn.
Video.title: The Rival Hash Houses

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: Claim jumper Jennie attempts to jump the mining claim of Buck Hansen near Rhyolite, Nevada.
Video.title: Claim Jumpin' Jennie

Video.summary: The town drunk Solomon asks the current newspaper owner to aid in his tall tales to his sister.
Video.title: Solomon in All His Glory

Video.summary: A little girl grows up to become a performer in a vaudeville show.
Video.title: Lotta Crabtree

Video.summary: Cowpoke Curt Morrison and pal Josh locate a spring on Native land soon to be opened to homesteaders.
Video.title: The Kickapoo Run

Video.summary: A newspaper man bets his girlfriend's father that he can make a fortune in three days.
Video.title: Mr. Godiva

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: Depositing his gold in San Francisco, a prospector encounters the temptations of the big city.
Video.title: Riggs and Riggs

Video.summary: Prospectors offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie Filene.
Video.title: Million Dollar Wedding

Video.summary: Wagon train members oppose their leader's desire to observe Sunday as a day of rest.
Video.title: The Seventh Day

Video.summary: A young monk, on his way to the San Gabriel Mission, gets lost and ends up in Death Valley.
Video.title: The Bell of San Gabriel

Video.summary: The romance of young lovers is threatened by their feuding families.
Video.title: Halfway Girl

Video.summary: A prospector strikes it rich and decides to marry the girl he left behind.
Video.title: Love 'Em and Leave 'Em

Video.summary: Saloonkeeper Shanghai Kelly kidnaps crewmen for understaffed ships.
Video.title: Shanghai Kelly's Birthday Party

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: A Dakota wife left on her own becomes the unwilling servant of two opportunistic highwaymen.
Video.title: The Sage Hen

Video.summary: An alcoholic tries to sober up long enough to save the lives of his friend and his niece.
Video.title: Solomon's Glory

Video.summary: John Parker was raised by Comanches since he was a boy and wants to remain with his Native family.
Video.title: The Understanding

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: George Parker's friend Michael encourages his rebellious ways and suggests he even change his name.
Video.title: Drop Out

Video.summary: The honeymoon is over when Jim Dayton's wife stumbles onto his past.
Video.title: Jimmy Dayton's Bonanza

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: Three orphaned children continue their parents' quest for gold.
Video.title: The Tenderfoot

Video.summary: A Mormon leader is determined to enforce God's law with a gun.
Video.title: Son of Thunder

Video.summary: A physician courts disaster by aiding one of two feuding Natives.
Video.title: The Lady Doctor

Video.summary: A trouble-shooter must establish a mail route in bandit country.
Video.title: The King of Uvalde Road

Video.summary: A young man hunts for gold, hoping to impress his girl so she'll accept his proposal.
Video.title: The Mezcla Man

Video.summary: A young woman flirts with a ranch hand while waiting for a proposal from her beau.
Video.title: Pioneer Pluck

Video.summary: Wagon master Caleb must bring his wayward son Johnny to justice after the boy goes too far.
Video.title: A Simple Question of Justice

Video.summary: A sheriff schemes to win an interest in California's wine industry.
Video.title: The Man Who Planted Gold in California

Image.alt: The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California
The Man Who Planted Gold in California

Video.summary: A loveless woman baker decides to leave, causing her town to lose its only pie supplier.
Video.title: The Solid Gold Pie

Video.summary: John Clum is given a task of turning a group of Apache men into a force that aids the U.S. Calvary.
Video.title: Clum's Constabulary

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: Count Peter intends to wed a don's daughter, but a misunderstanding lands him in hot water.
Video.title: Count Me In, Count Me Out

Image.alt: Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out
Count Me In, Count Me Out

Video.summary: Rachel Barrett's act of kindness toward an injured Native leads to her family's capture.
Video.title: A Gift

Video.summary: To avenge his son's death, an embittered rancher sets out to destroy a cowtown.
Video.title: The Oldest Law

Video.summary: An old thief outwits lawmen by returning to his rundown shack on the U.S.-Republic of Texas border.
Video.title: Old Stape

Video.summary: A cowboy and a Native man join forces to secure dowries for their sweethearts.
Video.title: Amos and the Black Bull

Video.summary: Red Eagle and Little Fawn fight an unscrupulous businessman to secure an army freight contract.
Video.title: The Contract
